Title: View shipment documents
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Order with shipment exists
Steps:
1. Open order > Documents section
2. Verify shipment document is listed
3. Open shipment document details

Title: Shipment document status changes
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Shipment document exists
Steps:
1. Open shipment document
2. Change shipment status through available transitions
3. Verify each status change

Title: Shipment address and price blocks
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Shipment document exists
Steps:
1. Open shipment document
2. Verify Shipment address block
3. Verify Shipment price block

Title: Add new line item to shipment
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Shipment document exists
Steps:
1. Open shipment document
2. Click 'Add' to add line item
3. Select product
4. Save

Title: Shipment document with new order
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
New order created
Steps:
1. Create new order
2. Open shipment document
3. Verify initial state

Title: Cancel order > adjust stock for single product FFC
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Order exists with product from Default FFC
'Adjust inventory for orders' enabled
Track inventory = TRUE
Steps:
1. Note current 'In stock' qty for product in Default FFC
2. Cancel the order
3. Verify stock inventory adjusts

Title: Cancel order > adjust stock for available FFC and multiple products
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Order exists with products from different FFCs
'Adjust inventory for orders' enabled
Steps:
1. Note current stock for products in different FFCs
2. Cancel the order
3. Verify stock adjusts for each product/FFC

Title: Non-cancelled status > stock doesn't change
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Order exists
Steps:
1. Set Payment status = Cancelled (not order)
2. Verify stock doesn't change
3. Set Shipment status = Cancelled (not order)
4. Verify stock doesn't change

Title: Shipment state — New to Sent skipping PickPack must fail
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Order exists with shipment in New status
API access available via Swagger at ${BACK_URL}/docs
Steps:
1. Retrieve order with shipment in New status via GET /api/order/customerOrders/{orderId}
2. Attempt to change shipment status directly from New to Sent (skip PickPack) via PUT request
3. Send the PUT request with modified shipment status
4. Inspect the HTTP response status code
5. Inspect the response body for error details
6. Verify shipment status remains New in subsequent GET request

Title: Shipment state — New to Delivered skipping PickPack and Sent must fail
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Order exists with shipment in New status
API access available via Swagger at ${BACK_URL}/docs
Steps:
1. Retrieve order with shipment in New status via GET /api/order/customerOrders/{orderId}
2. Attempt to change shipment status directly from New to Delivered (skip PickPack and Sent) via PUT request
3. Send the PUT request with modified shipment status
4. Inspect the HTTP response status code
5. Inspect the response body for error details
6. Verify shipment status remains New in subsequent GET request

Title: Shipment state — Delivered to Sent backward transition must fail
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Order exists with shipment in Delivered status (terminal state)
API access available via Swagger at ${BACK_URL}/docs
Steps:
1. Retrieve order with shipment in Delivered status via GET /api/order/customerOrders/{orderId}
2. Attempt to change shipment status from Delivered back to Sent via PUT request
3. Send the PUT request with modified shipment status
4. Inspect the HTTP response status code
5. Inspect the response body for error details
6. Verify shipment status remains Delivered in subsequent GET request
